meaning: n.(流行于十九世纪的一种)快步舞,该舞曲vi.跳该舞
examples: Galop and song. How good life will be!. Allegro.
You may conclude your interrupted galop, so that you will owe no ill - will to signor luigi, who has, indeed, throughout this whole affair acted like a gentleman.
France Galop said Dettori will have to undergo further drug testing from April 20 before he is allowed to return to racing.
And, of course, we have Marius Rossillon, who went by the name of O'Galop and started doing the big Michelin posters of Bibendum, the big fat guy.
